description: Trees and tree-like plants with trunks and elevated crowns.
plants: Dark needles and rough bark rising in a spire, holding its green through the coldest months when everything else has given up.
Stiff, fanning leaves atop a squat trunk, looking like something left over from an age before flowers existed.
Bare branches in winter, blazing color in autumn, and thick shade in summer. It marks the passing year better than any calendar.
A miniature evergreen growing so slowly that decades pass before it reaches your knee.
Green in every season, standing bright against snow and grey sky when the rest of the world has gone dormant.
A single smooth trunk crowned with broad fronds that rattle in the wind like dry applause.
A thick, unbranching column topped with a burst of stiff leaves, standing like a sentinel in dry heat.
A tall trunk rising from the earth, spreading its crown wide. Old enough to have witnessed what came before.
A slender trunk crowned with unfurling fronds, looking like something from a world much older than this one.
